| Tomatoes | Ralphs | $2.99 | — | 0.5 km |
| Onions | Vallarta Supermarkets | $0.69 | — | — |

Best stores:
Based on price + distance combined, Ralphs and Vons are recommended. These stores offer competitive prices on essential items, such as eggs (data not provided in price data), red tomatoes, and salsa, and have a relatively close distance of 0.5 km and 1.5 km, respectively, making them ideal options for those looking to save money without compromising on convenience.
